success.message: Thank you for signing up for the live tracking of this event. Tell your family and friends to follow you here and don't forget to activate your live tracking from 1 hour before the start of your race in this app!

unregister.successMessage: You have been successfully unregistered from this distance.

error.title: Failed to load data
error.unexpectedMessage: The server returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
error.invalidBibMessage: The bib number provided is invalid. Please check and try again.
error.registrationFailedMessage: Unable to complete registration. Please check your connection and try again.
error.cannotUnregisterMessage: Missing participant information. Please refresh and try again.
error.unregisterFailedMessage: Unable to unregister. Please try again.
error.networkErrorMessage: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.trackingAlreadyStartedMessage: Live tracking has already been activated for this event. You cannot unregister once tracking has started.
error.eventInProgressMessage: The event is currently in progress. You cannot unregister while the event is ongoing.
error.eventFinishedMessage: This event has already finished. Registration is no longer available.
error.validationErrorMessage: The information provided is invalid. Please check and try again.

registered.title: You're Already Registered!
registered.description: You're already registered for this distance. Get ready to race!

membership_required.title: Your Premium Access Has Expired
membership_required.description: Your free trial period has ended. Log in to your account via our website to manage your access.

limit_reached.title: Your Premium Access Has Expired
limit_reached.description: You've reached your yearly limit of 3 tracking sessions. Your current plan does not allow additional activations. Manage your subscription via our website.

unavailable.title: Not Available
unavailable.description: Registration for this distance is not yet configured. Please check back soon.

available.title: Ready to Race?
available.description: Secure your spot now before it fills up. Let's do this!
